programme.title: Malibooty
programme.desc: Three buddies (Brian Hooks, Sticky Fingaz, J.T. Jackson) leave their Arizona town and head to California for a wild beach party.

programme.title: The Sex Clinic
programme.desc: Matt comes in for an STI test but gets more than he bargained for; Chloe's having painful sex; Drew is worried about discharge.

programme.title: The Sex Clinic
programme.sub-title: STIs, Vaginal Flatulence, BDSM Sex and Discharge
programme.desc: Rae needs an STI test, Blessing wants advice about vaginal flatulence; Jack and Zofia need help maintaining their BDSM sex life; Daisie has an unusual discharge.

programme.title: The Sex Clinic
programme.sub-title: Sexual Health MOTs, Vaginal Dryness and Pegging
programme.desc: Louis needs a check-up; Becky wants advice on vaginal dryness; Connor wants a full sexual health MOT; Irfan wants advice.

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Jasmine is a paramedic science student worried that she is about to get kicked off her course because of her work as an exotic dancer, and web-cammer; Carly Ray carried on with sex work after graduation and is now an award-winning porn star.

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Ella has been bullied out of her university after her peers discovered she was an award-winning porn star, and Akonne is a sports science student and a stripper who doesn't consider himself to be a sex worker.

programme.title: Hollywood: No Sex, Please
programme.desc: Exploring how Hollywood has evolved to reflect society's changing attitudes towards sex over the decades, from "Basic Instinct" and "Body Heat" to "Mad Men" and "Sex and the City.".

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Excited to go on a date with her crush, Carlita is surprised to end up at his mother's house instead; "RuPaul's Drag Race" contestant Vanessa Vanjie Mateo goes on a date in Texas and when her date starts ignoring her, all hell starts breaking loose.

programme.title: Discontinued
programme.sub-title: Midge, Daft Punk, Quibi, Jessica Simpson's Edible Beauty Product Line
programme.desc: Discontinued uncovers the rise and fall of things from the past. The episode focuses on four diverse topics: Midge, Daft Punk, Quibi and Jessica Simpson's Edible Beauty Product Line.

programme.title: Discontinued
programme.sub-title: MTV's Punk'd, Richard Simmons Sweatin', HitClips, Colgate Dinners
programme.desc: Discontinued uncovers the rise and fall of things from the past. The episode focuses on four diverse topics: MTV's Punk'd, Richard Simmons Sweatin' to the Oldies, HitClips and Colgate Dinners.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Danny Trejo, the bad-boy icon with a heart of gold, grills his famous Trejo's Tacos in his backyard; Danny and his son Gilbert discuss Danny's wild past, what is truly important in life, and how good things happen when helping others.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Celebrities from the music industry reveal personal details about themselves while helping whip up some of their favorite home-cooked meals with their loved ones.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Freedia performs and judges the Miss Universe pageant, Freedia and Reid meet with the interior designer of Hotel Freedia, and Meredith must make a tough decision.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Freedia shoots the video for her new single "Central City Freestyle"; Meredith confesses she may leave Team Freedia; the team celebrates momentous news.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Hotel Freedia needs more funding; Tootie and Crystal discuss Freedia's businesses; Freedia decides her next project will be a gospel album.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Devon and Crystal voice their concerns about Freedia's gospel album; Tootie wants to be a travel agent; Crystal shares a personal story from her past.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: The life of Jamaican Robert Nesta Marley, known around the globe as reggae musician Bob Marley.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: Born to Rock
programme.desc: Following electrifying rock star Bruce Springsteen's career from the Jersey Shore to sold-out live performances in stadiums around the globe.

programme.title: Van Halen: A Mammoth Legacy
programme.desc: The career of Van Halen was as tumultuous as it was lucrative; they came to redefine the world of Rock and Roll; through all the trials and tribulations the band endured, their fame and influence in rock is cemented; this is the Mammoth Legacy of Van Halen.

programme.title: Bob Dylan: Leader of the Free World
programme.desc: Explore Bob Dylan's transformative journey through music, from folk poet to cultural icon and his impact on generations; learning the timeless legacy of his lyrics, voice and ever-evolving artistry.

programme.title: Jim Morrison's Final Chapter
programme.desc: Explore the life of Jim Morrison, the Doors frontman, and uncover the enigmatic details surrounding his untimely death in Paris at age 27.

programme.title: Willie Nelson: The Outlaw Country King
BKB: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: LT Nelson defends the BKB Middleweight Title against Mark Tiffin, and Jared Grant meets Jon Barnard with the BKB Lightweight World Championship at stake.

programme.title: Elvis & Priscilla: Conditional Love
programme.desc: Experts peel back the layers of Priscilla and the Rock 'n' Roll King's controversial love story to cast light on the dysfunction under the dreamy and glamorous surface.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Queen of Country
programme.desc: The story of multi-award winning country performer Dolly Parton.

programme.title: Stevie Nicks: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: For decades, Stevie Nicks has fronted one of the most successful bands in history, resurrecting them from the ashes; even with the trials and tribulations of being a member of Fleetwood Mac, Stevie has remained a role model.

programme.desc: Brittany wants to find out why her boyfriend, Taylor, has become distant.

programme.title: Dating a Sugar Daddy: Vogue Williams Investigates

programme.title: How To Have A Better Orgasm
programme.desc: Women share how their experience of orgasms has improved thanks to better interpersonal communication, or just making time for themselves. Personal accounts reveal that, across the board, there's a turning point in learning how to have a better one.

programme.desc: Alex goes on a karaoke date with Kevin, but is sad to learn that Kevin invited some friends.

programme.desc: Rap sensation and author Logic, along with Big Lenbo, cook up chicken curry while sharing Logic's journey from teenage poverty to global music stardom.

programme.title: Righteous Thieves
programme.desc: Annabel, the leader of a secret organization engaged in the recovery of priceless artwork, assembles a ragtag crew of art thieves to recover a Monet, Picasso, Degas and Van Gogh stolen by Nazis during WWII.
